descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg2] {Pierce DMG} [Arg1] {plural:[Arg1]|time|times} to a random enemy, and inflict {Poison} equal to 50% of the Damage. When Arithmetica is insufficient, it can still be forced out, but the effect changes to gaining [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus and {Exhaust} after played.
